title: Country Draft
description: 8 categories. 8 countries revealed one by one. Assign each country to the category where it ranks highest globally. Beat the optimal score.

title: Flag Quiz
shortDescription: 10 flags. Name the country or fail.
description: A flag appears with four options. Pick the right country. 10 rounds, no second chances.

title: Higher or Lower
shortDescription: Keep your streak alive. One wrong pick ends it.
description: Two countries, one stat. Pick which ranks higher. One mistake and your streak dies.

title: Capital Match
description: Given a country, pick the correct capital from four options. 10 rounds of pure knowledge.

title: Population Sort
description: Drag and sort countries from highest to lowest for a given statistic. Accuracy matters.

title: Country Streak
shortDescription: One wrong answer ends your run.
description: Identify countries from their flags. One wrong answer and it's game over. How long can you streak?

title: Border Buddies
shortDescription: Name every neighbor. Miss one and it shows.
description: A country appears. Name every country that shares a border with it. Every miss counts.

title: Continent Sprint
shortDescription: Name every country. The clock doesn't stop.
description: Pick a continent and name every country in it as fast as you can. The clock is ticking.

title: Stat Guesser
description: What's the population of Brazil? The GDP of Norway? Guess the number. Closer is better.

title: Speed Flags
shortDescription: 20 seconds. How many flags can you name?
description: 20 seconds on the clock. Identify as many flags as you can. Speed and accuracy both count.

title: Odd One Out
shortDescription: Three share a trait. One doesn't. Find it.
description: Four countries. Three share a trait. One doesn't. Find the odd one out.

title: Supremacy
description: A real-time card battle using real country data. Pick the stat category, compare cards, and outsmart your opponent across 5 rounds.

title: Borderline
shortDescription: Navigate borders to reach the target.
description: Start at a random country and navigate through borders to reach your target. Beat the optimal path or race a friend in real-time.

title: Blitz
shortDescription: Type the country. Fastest answer wins.
description: A flag appears. Type the country name as fast as you can. 10 rounds of pure speed. Play solo or race a friend head-to-head.
